roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SENTENCING/TN:OMAR FLORES/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 43 D/CTS:43/4019HALF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL ENROLL, PARTICIPATE AND COMPLETE ALL PROGRAMS  IDENTIFIED BY APD AS PART OF HIS INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN; SPECIFICALLY THETRANSITIONAL AGE YOUTH UNIT,/WS/DNACOMP/WEAP/PPRFCOMP/SA1:150 YARDS FROMPARTH MEHTA/SAORD/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURTNO, 20003862 IS ORDERED TO PAY RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY APD,/RESTV/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:ATC FOR POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/CTORD:THAT THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMENDCOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3 IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-27-20/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/PPRFCUST/VD:PHC OF 05-12-20//CONTD:SENTENCING ON 04-17-20/DOP/

/CAL:I&A, P&C, STATUS OF 19019111/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAWC/DEFTARR1/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO RELEASE ANDREPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/DEF:TO SUBMITA DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED; HAVE NO WEAPON; REMAIN WITHIN THEINTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING 7PM TO 9AM; CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL; ENGAGE IN PRE-APPROVEL ACTIVITY WHICH SERIFF MAYMODIFY HOURS TO ALLOW: SCHOOL/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/STWPX/987,2/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/SA1:PARTHA MEHTA/SAORD3/SAORD/
